controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance
Banks - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: 1These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to small finance banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 2agency business: means an arrangement under which a bank acts as an agent of a third-party product or s
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 2Agency Business: means an arrangement under which a bank acts
as an agent of a third-party product or service provider (TPPSP), without
risk participation, to facilitate the sale of the latter's financial products or
services (e.g., insurance, mutual fund, pension fund, etc.) to its own
customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 2agency business: means an arrangement under which a bank acts as an agent of a third-party product or s

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into an agreement with a tppsp for sale of only regulated financial products or services
controls.control_description:
Under agency business arrangement, the bank shall enter
into an agreement with a TPPSP for sale of only regulated financial
products or services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into an agreement with a tppsp for sale of only regulated financial products or services

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter-alia include marketing, sales, promotion, initial point of contact for redressal of grievance and other after-sale services related to the produ
controls.control_description:
The activities covered under agency business
arrangements may inter-alia include marketing, sales, promotion, initial
point of contact for redressal of grievance and other after-sale services
related to the product or service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter-alia include marketing, sales, promotion, initial point of contact for redressal of grievance and other after-sale services related to the produ

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
<image>
(1A) 'Assignee' shall have the same meaning as defined in the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Assignor' shall have the same meaning as defined in the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in terms of the accounting standards of the institute of chartered accounts of india
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Associate' shall have the same meaning as defined in terms of the
Accounting Standards of the Institute of Chartered Accounts of India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in terms of the accounting standards of the institute of chartered accounts of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Debtor' shall have the same meaning as defined in the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure any company to which the regulated entity (re) currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments) anytime du
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Debtor company ' means any company to which the regulated entity
(RE) currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure
(excluding equity instruments) anytime during the preceding twelve
months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any company to which the regulated entity (re) currently has or previously had a loan or investment exposure (excluding equity instruments) anytime du

controls.control_objective: To ensure equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to equity shares, compulsorily convertible preference shares (ccps) and compulsorily convertible debentures (ccd)

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
(7) 'Factoring' shall have the same meaning as defined in the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(8) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the
'business of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include - note: under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in any of the processes relating to the third-party products or service
controls.control_description:
Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
Note: Under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in
any of the processes relating to the third-party products or services
(TPPS) nor the name or brand of the bank shall feature in any of the
product/service documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include - note: under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in any of the processes relating to the third-party products or service

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be integrated with the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of the bank (unless specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a micro-site or micro-application
controls.control_description:
No processes relating to TPPS shall either
be integrated with the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of
the bank (unless specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a
micro-site or micro-application, except for an access link to redirect the
customer to the TPPSP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be integrated with the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of the bank (unless specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a micro-site or micro-application

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory mo
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory mo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for approval of policies and risk governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank
controls.control_description:
The Board of a bank shall be responsible for approval of policies and risk
governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for approval of policies and risk governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board-approved policies for, (1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability, appropriateness, a clear grievance r
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place Board-approved policies for,
(1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability,
appropriateness, a clear grievance redressal framework and
compensation policy to address service-related issues effectively as;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board-approved policies for, (1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability, appropriateness, a clear grievance r

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance red
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, at a minimum,
cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer
suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance
redressal,
(3) specifying the risk control measures and prudential norms for exposure
limits applicable to each trading member, factoring in parameters such as
net worth, business turnover, and other relevant risk indicators (in case
the bank intends to function as a Professional Clearing Member in the
commodity derivatives segment of SEBI-recognised exchanges);
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , at a minimum, cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance red

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place
controls.control_description:
In respect of insurance distribution business, the Board shall ensure that a
robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve limits for underwriting commitments pertaining to the credit risk on the debtor under without-recourse factoring
controls.control_description:
In respect of factoring business undertaken by the bank departmentally, the
Board shall approve limits for underwriting commitments pertaining to the credit
risk on the debtor under without-recourse factoring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve limits for underwriting commitments pertaining to the credit risk on the debtor under without-recourse factoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure : <image> (1) determine the aggregate exposure limits that the bank may assume on its registered clients, in relation to the bank's net worth, and ens
controls.control_description:
The Board of a bank intending to function as a Professional Clearing Member in
the commodity derivatives segment of SEBI-recognised exchanges shall:
<image>
(1) determine the aggregate exposure limits that the bank may assume on
its registered clients, in relation to the bank's net worth, and ensure that
the exposure is monitored on an ongoing basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : <image> (1) determine the aggregate exposure limits that the bank may assume on its registered clients, in relation to the bank's net worth, and ens

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at least as stringent as those prescribed by the commodity exchanges and the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
and
(2) prescribe internal margin requirements for the bank's operations as a
Professional Clearing Member, which shall be at least as stringent as
those prescribed by the Commodity Exchanges and the Reserve Bank,
wherever applicable as prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at least as stringent as those prescribed by the commodity exchanges and the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake businesses as permitted under section 5(b) and section 6(1) of the banking regulation act, 1949 departmentally
controls.control_description:
4Unless specified otherwise in these Directions, a bank may undertake
businesses as permitted under Section 5(b) and Section 6(1) of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949 departmentally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake businesses as permitted under section 5(b) and section 6(1) of the banking regulation act, 1949 departmentally

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) a bank shall require prior approval of the reserve bank to undertake any new form of business, other than
controls.control_description:
5An activity undertaken departmentally shall be subject to the following
conditions:
(1) A bank shall require prior approval of the Reserve Bank to undertake
any new form of business, other than those permitted in these
directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) a bank shall require prior approval of the reserve bank to undertake any new form of business, other than

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a policy for each form of business undertaken by the bank, which comprehensively covers various aspects of the said business including identificati
controls.control_description:
(2) There shall be a policy for each form of business undertaken by the
bank, which comprehensively covers various aspects of the said
business including identification of various risks associated with it, an
appropriate risk mitigation framework, and adherence to capital
allocation norms as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a policy for each form of business undertaken by the bank, which comprehensively covers various aspects of the said business including identificati

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake forms of businesses listed under para 13b below unless advised oth
controls.control_description:
7The NOFHC, as applicable, shall not require prior approval of the Reserve
Bank for the entities held by it to undertake forms of businesses listed under
para 13B below unless advised otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake forms of businesses listed under para 13b below unless advised oth

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the reserve bank within 15 days from the date of resolution of the board for undertaking such businesses
controls.control_description:
The NOFHC shall intimate the
Reserve Bank within 15 days from the date of resolution of the Board for
undertaking such businesses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the reserve bank within 15 days from the date of resolution of the board for undertaking such businesses

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business subject to other instructions as ap
controls.control_description:
Further, an NOFHC shall require the prior approval
of the Reserve Bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of
business subject to other instructions as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the prior approval of the reserve bank for the entities held by it to undertake any other form of business subject to other instructions as ap

controls.control_objective: To ensure be carried out departmentally by the bank, but only through a group entity held under nofhc, as applicable
controls.control_description:
8Mutual fund business, insurance business, pension fund management,
investment advisory and management services, portfolio management
services and broking services shall not be carried out departmentally by the bank,
but only through a group entity held under NOFHC, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be carried out departmentally by the bank, but only through a group entity held under nofhc, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read in conjunction with reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be read in conjunction with Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be read in conjunction with reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to their respective licensing guidelines/conditions
controls.control_description:
Further,
conduct of business by Small Finance Banks shall also be subject to their
respective licensing guidelines/conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be subject to their respective licensing guidelines/conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to conditions stipulated in the following paragraphs
controls.control_description:
Investment by a bank in a financial services company or a non-financial services
company shall be subject to conditions stipulated in the following paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to conditions stipulated in the following paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 10 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves as per the last audited balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance sheet of the la
controls.control_description:
Equity investment by a bank in any entity individually, shall not exceed 10 per
cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves as per the last audited
balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance sheet of the latest quarter,
whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 10 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves as per the last audited balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance sheet of the la

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves as per the last audited balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance sheet of the la
controls.control_description:
The aggregate equity investments made in all entities, including overseas
investments, shall not exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital
and reserves as per the last audited balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance
sheet of the latest quarter, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of the bank's paid-up share capital and reserves as per the last audited balance sheet or audited/unaudited balance sheet of the la

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded: (1) investments in the equity of entities held under 'held for trading' category as stipulated in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025 as updated from time to time
controls.control_description:
For calculating the aggregate
equity investment limit, the following investments shall be excluded:
(1) investments in the equity of entities held under 'Held for Trading' category
as stipulated in the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks -
Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025 as updated from time to time, subject to the limit
stipulated under Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded: (1) investments in the equity of entities held under 'held for trading' category as stipulated in the reserve bank of india (small finance banks - classification, valuation and operation of investment portfolio) directions, 2025 as updated from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the minimum prescribed capital (including capital conservation buffer) post the investment
controls.control_description:
A bank may make an aggregate investment of less than 20 per cent in the equity
share capital of an entity without prior approval, subject to the following
conditions:
(1) The bank's CRAR shall not be less than the minimum prescribed capital
(including Capital Conservation Buffer) post the investment;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the minimum prescribed capital (including capital conservation buffer) post the investment

controls.control_objective: To ensure have reported net profit in each of the preceding two financial years
controls.control_description:
and
(2) The bank should have reported net profit in each of the preceding two
financial years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have reported net profit in each of the preceding two financial years

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the conditions listed above, investments held under 'Held for
Trading' category shall not require prior approval, subject to the limit stipulated
under Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an aggregate investment of 20 percent or more in the equity share capital of an entity
controls.control_description:
A bank, with prior approval of the Reserve Bank, may make an aggregate
investment of 20 percent or more in the equity share capital of an entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an aggregate investment of 20 percent or more in the equity share capital of an entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to invest 20 per cent or more in the equity share capital of a non-financial services entity but not exceeding 30 per cent only in the following circumstances: (1) the investee entity is engaged in non-financial business permissible for banks under section 6(1) of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Save as otherwise provided in these directions, a bank shall be allowed to invest
20 per cent or more in the equity share capital of a non-financial services entity
but not exceeding 30 per cent only in the following circumstances:
(1) the investee entity is engaged in non-financial business permissible for
banks under Section 6(1) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, subject
to prior approval of the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to invest 20 per cent or more in the equity share capital of a non-financial services entity but not exceeding 30 per cent only in the following circumstances: (1) the investee entity is engaged in non-financial business permissible for banks under section 6(1) of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure require prior approval for such acquisitions
controls.control_description: (3) Banks shall not require prior approval for such acquisitions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require prior approval for such acquisitions

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a time bound action plan for disposal of such shares
controls.control_description:
however,
they shall submit a time bound action plan for disposal of such shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a time bound action plan for disposal of such shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted within 30 days of such acquisition
controls.control_description: The action plan shall be submitted within 30 days of such acquisition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted within 30 days of such acquisition

controls.control_objective: To ensure sponsor (as defined in the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interest act, 2002) more than one asset r
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not sponsor (as defined in the Securitisation and Reconstruction of
Financial Assets and Enforcement of Security Interest Act, 2002) more than one
Asset Reconstruction Company (ARC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to sponsor (as defined in the securitisation and reconstruction of financial assets and enforcement of security interest act, 2002) more than one asset r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 20 per cent of the equity share capital of the arc
controls.control_description:
The aggregate shareholding of the bank
in any ARC shall be less than 20 per cent of the equity share capital of the ARC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 20 per cent of the equity share capital of the arc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations
controls.control_description:
A bank's investment policy shall have suitable provisions governing its
investments in an AIF Scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have suitable provisions governing its investments in an aif scheme, compliant with extant law and regulations

controls.control_objective: To ensure contribute more than 10 percent to the corpus of a category i or category ii aif scheme
controls.control_description:
11A bank shall not contribute more than 10 percent to the corpus of a Category
I or Category II AIF Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contribute more than 10 percent to the corpus of a category i or category ii aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme
controls.control_description:
The aggregate contribution by all Regulated Entities (REs) in any AIF Scheme
shall not be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be more than 20 percent of the corpus of that scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)
controls.control_description:
In this context, 'RE' shall mean:
(1) Commercial Banks (including Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean: (1) commercial banks (including small finance banks, local area banks)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme
controls.control_description:
Where a bank contributes more than five percent of the corpus of an AIF Scheme
that has downstream investment (excluding equity instruments) in a debtor
company of the bank, the bank shall be required to make 100 percent provision
to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the
AIF Scheme, subject to a cap equivalent to bank's direct loan and / or investment
exposure to the said debtor company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to make 100 percent provision to the extent of its proportionate investment in the debtor company through the aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the provisions of paragraph 26 above, where a bank's
contribution is in the form of subordinated units, it shall deduct the entire
investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both Tier-1 and Tier-2
capital (wherever applicable).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deduct the entire investment from its capital funds - proportionately from both tier-1 and tier-2 capital (wherever applicable)

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b.3 of chapter iii
controls.control_description:
13The RBI may, in consultation with the Government of India, by way of a
notification, exempt certain AIFs (Annex I) from the scope of these Directions
on AIF contained in Part B.3 of Chapter III, except for paragraph 23 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in consultation with the government of india, by way of a notification, exempt certain aifs (annex i) from the scope of these directions on aif contained in part b.3 of chapter iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure make any investment in the corpus of category iii aif scheme
controls.control_description: No bank shall make any investment in the corpus of Category III AIF scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make any investment in the corpus of category iii aif scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their exposure in an investee company through their investments in aif schemes does not result in circumvention of any regulations applica
controls.control_description:
Additionally, banks shall ensure that their exposure in an investee company
through their investments in AIF schemes does not result in circumvention of any
regulations applicable to banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their exposure in an investee company through their investments in aif schemes does not result in circumvention of any regulations applica

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an investment of more than 10 per cent in the unit capital of a real estate investment trust/infrastructure investment trust within the overall c
controls.control_description:
No bank shall make an investment of more than 10 per cent in the unit capital of
a Real Estate Investment Trust/Infrastructure Investment Trust within the overall
ceiling of 20 per cent of the bank's net worth permitted for all direct investments
in shares, convertible bonds/ debentures, units of equity-oriented mutual funds
and exposures to AIFs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an investment of more than 10 per cent in the unit capital of a real estate investment trust/infrastructure investment trust within the overall c

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accounted for the purpose of determining additional capital requirement which will be subject to supervisory review and evaluation process: (1) ris
controls.control_description:
As part of bank's ICAAP framework, the following shall be accounted for the
purpose of determining additional capital requirement which will be subject to
Supervisory Review and Evaluation Process:
(1) risks arising on account of equity investments in unit/paid-up capital, as
applicable, of an AIF Scheme done directly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accounted for the purpose of determining additional capital requirement which will be subject to supervisory review and evaluation process: (1) ris

controls.control_objective: To ensure be read in conjunction with exposure norms and large exposure framework as applicable to banks (reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentra
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be read in conjunction with Exposure Norms and Large
Exposure Framework as applicable to banks (Reserve Bank of India (Small
Finance Banks - Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be read in conjunction with exposure norms and large exposure framework as applicable to banks (reserve bank of india (small finance banks - concentra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the department of regulation of the reserve bank on pravaah portal through the applicable form within 15 days, from the date of occurre
controls.control_description:
Breach, if any, in the limits prescribed under this Master Direction shall be
reported to the Department of Regulation of the Reserve Bank on PRAVAAH
portal through the applicable form within 15 days, from the date of occurrence of
such breach along with reason for such a breach and a plan to correct the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the department of regulation of the reserve bank on pravaah portal through the applicable form within 15 days, from the date of occurre

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an action plan by march 31, 2026, to comply with the provisions contained herein within a specified timeline but not later than march 31, 2028
controls.control_description:
A bank which is not in conformity with the directions given in paragraphs 16 to
22 and 31A to 31C above, shall submit an action plan by March 31, 2026, to
comply with the provisions contained herein within a specified timeline but not
later than March 31, 2028.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an action plan by march 31, 2026, to comply with the provisions contained herein within a specified timeline but not later than march 31, 2028

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A bank desirous of making an investment or undertaking any business that
requires prior approval / no-objection of RBI shall submit an application through
Pravaah Portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation
(DoR), Central Office, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) equipment leasing and hire purchase shall be treated on par with loans and advances and shall accordingly
controls.control_description:
Equipment Leasing and Hire Purchase business undertaken departmentally shall
be subject to the following conditions:
(1) Equipment leasing and hire purchase shall be treated on par with loans
and advances and shall accordingly be subject to the extant prudential
norms on loans and advances as applicable;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) equipment leasing and hire purchase shall be treated on par with loans and advances and shall accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into leasing agreement with another equipment leasing company and other non-banking finance company engaged in equipment leasing
controls.control_description:
and
(2) A bank shall not enter into leasing agreement with another equipment
leasing company and other non-banking finance company engaged in
equipment leasing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into leasing agreement with another equipment leasing company and other non-banking finance company engaged in equipment leasing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) factoring services shall be provided on with recourse or without recourse or on limited recourse basis
controls.control_description:
Factoring business undertaken departmentally shall be subject to the following
conditions:
(1) Factoring services shall be provided on with recourse or without recourse or on
limited recourse basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) factoring services shall be provided on with recourse or without recourse or on limited recourse basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the board approved limits
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with the board approved limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct thorough credit appraisal of debtors before entering into any factoring arrangement or establishing lines of credit with the export factor
controls.control_description:
(3) A bank shall conduct thorough credit appraisal of debtors before entering into
any factoring arrangement or establishing lines of credit with the export factor;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct thorough credit appraisal of debtors before entering into any factoring arrangement or establishing lines of credit with the export factor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended against invoices representing genuine trade transactions
controls.control_description:
(4) Factoring services shall be extended against invoices representing genuine
trade transactions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended against invoices representing genuine trade transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated on par with loans and advances and shall be subject to extant prudential norms on loans and advances as applicable
controls.control_description:
(5) Factoring shall be treated on par with loans and advances and shall be subject
to extant prudential norms on loans and advances as applicable;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated on par with loans and advances and shall be subject to extant prudential norms on loans and advances as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a mechanism for sharing information about common borrowers to avoid double financing
controls.control_description:
(6) A bank and factor shall put in place a mechanism for sharing information about
common borrowers to avoid double financing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a mechanism for sharing information about common borrowers to avoid double financing

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain periodical certificates from the borrower about factored receivables
controls.control_description:
The borrower's bank shall obtain
periodical certificates from the borrower about factored receivables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain periodical certificates from the borrower about factored receivables

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the sanctioned limits of the borrower to the concerned banks
controls.control_description:
Factors
shall report the sanctioned limits of the borrower to the concerned banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the sanctioned limits of the borrower to the concerned banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be considered
controls.control_description: Information available on CERSAI shall also be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the authorisation from the internal debt management department (idmd), rbi
controls.control_description:
Primary dealership business undertaken departmentally shall be subject to the
authorisation from the Internal Debt Management Department (IDMD), RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the authorisation from the internal debt management department (idmd), rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure directly approach idmd for the same
controls.control_description:
The
bank shall directly approach IDMD for the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to directly approach idmd for the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so departmentally
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to engage in underwriting of issues of shares, debentures and
bonds shall do so departmentally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so departmentally

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the conditions and prudential regulation requirements specified in chapter iii
controls.control_description:
Underwriting business undertaken
departmentally shall be subject to the conditions and prudential regulation
requirements specified in Chapter III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the conditions and prudential regulation requirements specified in chapter iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken only for the products and services in which a bank is permitted to deal in as per banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Agency business shall be undertaken only for the products and services in which
a bank is permitted to deal in as per Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken only for the products and services in which a bank is permitted to deal in as per banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation
controls.control_description: The service shall be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank may undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non risk sharing basis, not requiri
controls.control_description:
Agency business of mutual fund companies undertaken departmentally shall be
subject to the following additional conditions:
(1) A bank may undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non risk sharing
basis, not requiring commitment of their own funds after complying with the
requirements of the sectoral regulator for such products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank may undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non risk sharing basis, not requiri

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents
controls.control_description:
(2) The investors' applications for purchase / sale of mutual fund units shall be
forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the customers' risk without the bank guaranteeing any assured return
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) The purchase of units shall be at the customers' risk without the bank
guaranteeing any assured return;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at the customers' risk without the bank guaranteeing any assured return

controls.control_objective: To ensure be acquired from the secondary market or bought back from a customer for selling it to other customers
controls.control_description:
(4) Mutual fund units shall not be acquired from the secondary market or bought
back from a customer for selling it to other customers;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be acquired from the secondary market or bought back from a customer for selling it to other customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the master directions on credit facility
controls.control_description:
(5) Extension of credit facility to individuals against the security of mutual fund units
shall be in accordance with the Master Directions on Credit Facility;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in accordance with the master directions on credit facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own investments
controls.control_description:
and
(6) A bank holding custody of mutual fund units on behalf of its customers shall
keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank may undertake distribution of insurance units on a non-risk sharing basis, not requiring
controls.control_description:
Corporate agency of insurance companies undertaken departmentally by banks
shall be subject to the following additional conditions:
(1) A bank may undertake distribution of Insurance units on a non-risk sharing
basis, not requiring commitment of their own funds after complying with
the requirements of the sectoral regulator for such products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank may undertake distribution of insurance units on a non-risk sharing basis, not requiring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a comprehensive policy approved by appropriate authority, encompassing the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, issues of customer approp
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a comprehensive policy approved by appropriate authority, encompassing the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, issues of customer approp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank other than itself
controls.control_description:
(3) The deposit to be maintained by an insurance broker as per the IRDAI
(Licensing of Banks as Insurance Brokers) Regulations, 2013, as
amended from time to time, shall be maintained with a scheduled
commercial bank other than itself;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank other than itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:
controls.control_description: (4) A bank shall ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure possess the requisite qualification prescribed by irdai
controls.control_description:
(i) All employees dealing with insurance agency / broking business shall
possess the requisite qualification prescribed by IRDAI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to possess the requisite qualification prescribed by irdai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be standardised system of assessing the need / suitability of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction processes shall be segregated
controls.control_description:
(ii) There shall be standardised system of assessing the need / suitability
of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction processes
shall be segregated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be standardised system of assessing the need / suitability of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction processes shall be segregated

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the bank to necessarily undertake a customer need assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term products with no investment or growth compon
controls.control_description:
Products with investment components shall
require the bank to necessarily undertake a customer need
assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term products with no
investment or growth component shall be deemed as universally
suitable products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the bank to necessarily undertake a customer need assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term products with no investment or growth compon

controls.control_objective: To ensure treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold
controls.control_description:
(iii) A bank shall treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with
regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product
sold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure for staff is not violative of section 10(1) (ii) of the br act, 1949 or the guidelines
controls.control_description:
<image>
(5) It shall be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure
for staff is not violative of Section 10(1) (ii) of the BR Act, 1949 or the
guidelines issued by IRDAI in payment of commissions / brokerage /
incentives.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure for staff is not violative of section 10(1) (ii) of the br act, 1949 or the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that no incentive (cash or non-cash) is paid to the staff engaged in insurance broking / corporate agency services by the insurance co
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that no incentive (cash or non-cash) is paid to the staff engaged in insurance broking / corporate agency services by the insurance co

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such products to any
controls.control_description:
(6) A bank shall not follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to
either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such
products to any banking product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such products to any

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently stated in all publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's customer of any insurance product is purely volu
controls.control_description:
It shall be prominently stated in all
publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's
customer of any insurance product is purely voluntary and is not linked to
availment of any other facility from the bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently stated in all publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's customer of any insurance product is purely volu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place along with a comprehensive customer compensation policy for resolving issues related to services offered
controls.control_description:
and
(7) A robust internal grievance redressal mechanism shall be put in place
along with a comprehensive customer compensation policy for resolving
issues related to services offered.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be put in place along with a comprehensive customer compensation policy for resolving issues related to services offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the insurance companies whose products are being sold have robust customer grievance redressal arrangements in place
controls.control_description:
It shall be ensured that the insurance
companies whose products are being sold have robust customer
grievance redressal arrangements in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the insurance companies whose products are being sold have robust customer grievance redressal arrangements in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate the redressal of grievances
controls.control_description:
The bank shall facilitate the
redressal of grievances
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate the redressal of grievances

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so only for financial products other than insurance, on a non-risk participation basis
controls.control_description:
A bank offering referral services shall do so only for financial products other than
insurance, on a non-risk participation basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so only for financial products other than insurance, on a non-risk participation basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so with non-bank clients subject to the directions issued by reserve bank on the subject
controls.control_description:
A bank intending to undertake the business of retailing of Government Securities
shall do so with non-bank clients subject to the Directions issued by Reserve
Bank on the subject.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so with non-bank clients subject to the directions issued by reserve bank on the subject

controls.control_objective: To ensure become a trading / clearing member of the currency derivatives segment of the sebi recognised stock exchanges
controls.control_description:
An AD Category I small finance bank may become a trading / clearing member
of the currency derivatives segment of the SEBI recognised stock exchanges,
subject to meeting all of the following conditions:
(1) It has a minimum net worth of ₹500 crore;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become a trading / clearing member of the currency derivatives segment of the sebi recognised stock exchanges

controls.control_objective: To ensure , a bank not meeting the aforesaid conditions may participate in the currency futures market as a client
controls.control_description:
Provided that, a bank not meeting the aforesaid conditions may participate in the
currency futures market as a client.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , a bank not meeting the aforesaid conditions may participate in the currency futures market as a client

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep its and its clients' position distinct from one another
controls.control_description:
A bank that is a trading / clearing member shall keep its and its clients'
position distinct from one another.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep its and its clients' position distinct from one another

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so subject to satisfying the membership criteria of the stock exchanges and complying with the regulatory norms laid down by sebi and the respectiv
controls.control_description:
A bank which intends to become a member of a SEBI approved stock exchange
for the purpose of undertaking proprietary transactions in the corporate bond
market shall do so subject to satisfying the membership criteria of the stock
exchanges and complying with the regulatory norms laid down by SEBI and the
respective stock exchange.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so subject to satisfying the membership criteria of the stock exchanges and complying with the regulatory norms laid down by sebi and the respectiv

controls.control_objective: To ensure satisfy the membership criteria of the stock exchanges and comply with the regulatory norms laid down by sebi and the respective stock exchanges
controls.control_description:
A bank may become a Professional Clearing Member of the commodity
derivatives segment of SEBI recognised exchanges only upon satisfying the
prudential criteria given in paragraph 43, and subject to the following conditions:
(1) A bank shall satisfy the membership criteria of the stock exchanges and
comply with the regulatory norms laid down by SEBI and the respective
stock exchanges;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to satisfy the membership criteria of the stock exchanges and comply with the regulatory norms laid down by sebi and the respective stock exchanges

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the approval of board, put in place effective risk control measures, prudential norms on risk exposure in respect of each of its trading member
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank shall, with the approval of Board, put in place effective risk control
measures, prudential norms on risk exposure in respect of each of its
trading members, taking into account their net worth, business turnover,
etc.;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , with the approval of board, put in place effective risk control measures, prudential norms on risk exposure in respect of each of its trading member

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake trading in the derivative segment of the commodity exchange on its own account and shall restrict itself only to clearing and settlement tra
controls.control_description:
(3) A bank shall not undertake trading in the derivative segment of the
commodity exchange on its own account and shall restrict itself only to
clearing and settlement transactions done by the trading members / clients
on the exchange;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake trading in the derivative segment of the commodity exchange on its own account and shall restrict itself only to clearing and settlement tra

controls.control_objective: To ensure take exposure on its trading members as per the policy approved by its board
controls.control_description:
(4) A bank shall take exposure on its trading members as per the policy
approved by its board;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take exposure on its trading members as per the policy approved by its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure fulfil pay-in obligations arising out of trades executed by its clients, as clearing member of the exchange subject to the condition that the total ex
controls.control_description:
(5) A bank may fulfil pay-in obligations arising out of trades executed by its
clients, as clearing member of the exchange subject to the condition that
the total exposure which the bank would take on its registered clients
should be determined by the Board in relation to the net worth of the bank
and should be monitored regularly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fulfil pay-in obligations arising out of trades executed by its clients, as clearing member of the exchange subject to the condition that the total ex

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet pay- <image> in obligations of any transaction other than what is required in its role as a professional clearing member
controls.control_description:
However, the bank shall not meet pay-
<image>
in obligations of any transaction other than what is required in its role as a
Professional Clearing Member;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet pay- <image> in obligations of any transaction other than what is required in its role as a professional clearing member

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure strict compliance with various margin requirements as may be prescribed by a bank's board or the commodity exchanges as also the extant rbi gui
controls.control_description:
and
(6) A bank shall ensure strict compliance with various margin requirements as
may be prescribed by a bank's board or the Commodity Exchanges as
also the extant RBI guidelines regarding guarantees issued on behalf of
commodity brokers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure strict compliance with various margin requirements as may be prescribed by a bank's board or the commodity exchanges as also the extant rbi gui

controls.control_objective: To ensure become professional clearing member for equity derivative segment of the sebi recognised stock exchanges
controls.control_description:
18A bank may become Professional Clearing Member for equity derivative
segment of the SEBI recognised stock exchanges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become professional clearing member for equity derivative segment of the sebi recognised stock exchanges

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply mutatis mutandis to the equity derivative segment
controls.control_description:
Prudential criteria and conditions
stipulated for commodity derivative segment in para 45 above shall apply mutatis
mutandis to the equity derivative segment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply mutatis mutandis to the equity derivative segment

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
